parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id            AS survey_id,
  s.name          AS survey_name,
  q.id            AS question_id,
  q.question_order,
  q.question_text,
  q.question_type,
  q.is_required,
  qo.id           AS option_id,
  qo.option_order,
  qo.option_text
FROM surveys s
JOIN questions q ON q.survey_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN question_options qo ON qo.question_id = q.id
WHERE s.id = $1
ORDER BY q.question_order, qo.option_order
